components.prompt: Read project README and existing code structure. Identify all files and modules relevant to the feature request: {#prompt#}. Produce a step-by-step implementation plan.
Is the implementation plan clear and complete? Are all dependencies identified and all affected files listed?
Implement the feature: {#prompt#}. Follow project coding conventions. Write production code first, then add or update tests. Keep changes minimal and focused.
Do all existing and new tests pass? Is the implementation free of obvious bugs (edge cases handled, error paths covered)?

Goal: Feature '{#prompt#}' is implemented, tested, and ready. Verify: (1) all new files follow conventions, (2) existing functionality is preserved, (3) documentation is updated if needed. Mark the goal as complete.
